LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DENNIS MULLEN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES IS CONTINUED FROM JUNE 23, 2016 TO JULY 6, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES AND ORAL EX PARTE ORDER ON JUNE 22, 2016. (302)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-06-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DENNIS MULLEN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS GRANTED. MR. MULLEN IS AWARDED ATTORNEY'S FEES OF $5,185 AGAINST PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK (SEE ORDER FOR FULL TEXT). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MATTHEW J. KUMAR OF THE LAW OFFICES OF RORY W. CLARK, TEL. NO. 1-818-707-2733 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. PAUL R. PERDUE, TEL. NO. 1-415-291-0474 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE COURT TO CONTEST THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT GAVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO ARGUE THE MATTER. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Dennis Mullen's motion for attorney's fees is granted. Mr. Mullen is awarded attorney's fees of $5,185 against plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank. Per Civil Code 1717, because the Bank would have been entitled to fees had it prevailed on either of its claims, Mr. Mullen is entitled to an award of fees because he prevailed on both of the Bank's claims. The Bank does not contest the reasonableness of the amount of fees sought by Mr. Mullen. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Continued To Jul-06-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2016 Dismissal - No Appearance
